headline: CBRE (CBRE) Stock Looks Undervalued On Cash Flow But Fair On Earnings
summary: CBRE Group’s share price has delivered a 71.4% total return over the past five years, and the latest intrinsic value estimate based on a Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) approach suggests the stock may still trade below that estimate while the broader valuation checks point to a more mixed picture. Over five years, CBRE Group has returned 71.4%, which puts recent short-term weakness into the context of a longer period in which shareholders have still come out ahead. Analyst optimism around CBRE...

headline: CBRE Group (CBRE) Could Be 22% Undervalued After Its $150 Million Financing Win
summary: CBRE Group (CBRE) is back in focus after arranging more than $150 million in Commercial Property Assessed Clean Energy financing for Venu Holding Corporation, aimed at fully funding two upcoming amphitheater projects. See our latest analysis for CBRE Group. For context, CBRE Group’s share price is $138.03 and has drifted down year to date, with a year to date share price return of 13.83% and a 90 day share price return of 6.15%. headline: What to Expect From CBRE Group's Q2 2026 Earnings Report
summary: CBRE Group will release its second-quarter earnings later this month, and analysts anticipate a double-digit bottom-line growth.
